getting-started.title: Getting Started with Your Brand
getting-started.excerpt: Learn how to set up your account and start using the platform in minutes.
getting-started.content:
Welcome to Your Brand! This guide walks you through the initial setup process.

First, create your account by visiting our dashboard. You will be guided through a simple onboarding flow that helps you configure your workspace.

Once set up, you can invite team members, connect your existing tools via our integrations page, and start building your first project.

Our platform is designed to be intuitive, but if you need help, our support team is available 24/7.

best-practices.title: Best Practices for Team Collaboration
best-practices.excerpt: Discover proven strategies to improve your team's productivity and communication.
best-practices.content:
Effective collaboration is the cornerstone of any successful team. Here are our top recommendations.

Establish clear communication channels from the start. Use dedicated spaces for different topics to avoid information overload.

Set up automated workflows to reduce repetitive tasks. Our platform supports custom automation rules that can save your team hours each week.

Regularly review your processes and gather feedback from your team. Continuous improvement leads to better outcomes.

product-update.title: Product Update: What's New in v2.0
product-update.excerpt: Explore the latest features and improvements in our newest release.
product-update.content:
We are excited to announce the release of version 2.0, packed with features our users have been requesting.

The redesigned dashboard provides a clearer overview of your projects and metrics. Navigation has been simplified based on user feedback.

New integration options allow you to connect with even more third-party tools. We have also improved performance across the board, with page loads now 40% faster.

Security has been enhanced with two-factor authentication and improved access controls.
